title: The most insane week in AI
summary: A YouTube video reviewing major AI announcements from a single week, including new model releases from DeepSeek, Alibaba, Xiaomi, OpenAI, Qwen, and Tencent. The video covers both foundation models and specialized tools across vision, reasoning, game-playing, and design tasks.
